ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  ACUTAAS CHEMICALS LIMITED has promoted Mr. Anurag Shukla to General Manager Operations & Unit Head Ankleshwar, designating him as Senior Management Personnel (SMP) effective July 2, 2026. This strategic internal promotion significantly strengthens the company's operational leadership, bringing an individual with over 21 years of extensive experience in pharmaceutical manufacturing, plant operations, and regulatory compliance into a critical role. The appointment represents a routine enhancement of the company's management structure and presents no immediate red flags.
